document_sentence_array.text: The Facebook initial public offering on May 18, 2012, was one of the largest in technology history, raising $16 billion at a valuation of $104 billion.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal logs from the April 16th diligence session show that the CFO shared revised internal revenue forecasts with lead analysts, citing a rapid shift to mobile usage.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Initial price ranges for the offering were set between $28 and $35 per share before being increased to $38 due to high retail demand.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Our equity research team is concerned that the public prospectus does not fully quantify the risk of lower ad impressions on mobile devices.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Verbal disclosures made during the roadshow suggest that Q2 revenue could be 5% lower than previous guidance, information shared only with a select group of institutional funds.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Nasdaq officials have publicly acknowledged that a technical glitch in the IPO cross-application delayed the opening of trading for nearly 30 minutes.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: The lead underwriter's 'Preferred Client' list was reportedly warned to reduce their position sizing three days before the stock hit the secondary market.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Market sentiment remains volatile as several high-profile tech bloggers have questioned the company's long-term monetization strategy.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Internal compliance emails flag that the sudden increase in the offering size to 421 million shares was designed to meet 'synthetic' demand from retail brokers.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Mark Zuckerberg will maintain 57% of the voting power post-IPO through a dual-class stock structure, as disclosed in the S-1 filing.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: A confidential legal memo suggests that the selective disclosure of revised estimates may constitute a direct violation of Regulation FD (Fair Disclosure).
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Investment bankers at Morgan Stanley were actively buying shares on the open market to prevent the price from falling below the $38 offer floor.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: General Motors publicly announced its decision to pull $10 million in advertising from the site, citing concerns about ad effectiveness.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: The syndicate's internal 'Book of Demand' showed that institutional interest had softened significantly following the private forecast revisions.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The SEC is likely to investigate the Nasdaq 'Error Account' which assumed a short position of 3 million shares during the opening volatility.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Traditional valuation metrics, such as Price-to-Earnings ratios, place the stock at a significant premium compared to Google or Apple.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Confidential chats between traders indicate that the 'Green Shoe' over-allotment was fully exercised to offset heavy selling by early venture capital backers.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Analysts are monitoring user engagement metrics to see if the 'Like' button remains an effective proxy for consumer intent.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Shares closed their first day of trading at $38.23, barely above the initial offer price, disappointing many first-time investors.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: The unannounced decision to allow Peter Thiel and other insiders to double their secondary share sales was finalized only 48 hours before the pricing.
document_sentence_array.label: High
